drinks.name: Classic Milk Tea
drinks.description: Traditional black tea with creamy milk and chewy tapioca pearls.

drinks.name: Taro Bliss
drinks.description: Sweet taro root blended with milk and your choice of toppings.

drinks.name: Matcha Zen
drinks.description: Premium Japanese matcha whisked with oat milk and honey boba.

drinks.name: Strawberry Cloud
drinks.description: Fresh strawberries blended with jasmine tea, topped with sweet cheese foam.

drinks.name: Brown Sugar Tiger
drinks.description: House-made brown sugar syrup swirled with fresh milk and chewy pearls.
drinks.caffeine: typically low caffeine or none if no tea base is used

snacks.name: Mochi Trio
snacks.description: Three pieces of handmade mochi in rotating seasonal flavors.
allergy_info: may contain dairy depending on flavor
may contain nuts depending on flavor

snacks.name: Taiyaki
snacks.description: Fish-shaped waffle pastry filled with red bean, Nutella, or custard.
allergy_info: may contain nuts depending on filling

snacks.name: Poké Bowl
snacks.description: Fresh tuna or tofu over seasoned rice with avocado, edamame, and sesame.

snacks.name: Summer Rolls
snacks.description: Two rice paper rolls with shrimp or tofu, fresh herbs, and rice noodles.
allergy_info: may contain shellfish if shrimp is selected
may contain soy depending on ingredients

merch.name: TeaZen Zen Vibes Tee
merch.description: 100% organic cotton. Sizes S to XL. Wear in-store for 10% off your drink.

merch.name: TeaZen Boba Tumbler
merch.description: 20oz tumbler with wide boba straw. Keeps drinks cold for hours. Bring it in for 10% off.

events.name: K-Pop Night
events.description: TeaZen hosts K-Pop Night for customers who want a fun music and hangout experience.

events.name: Acoustic Night
events.description: A relaxed live music event for customers who want a calm TeaZen atmosphere.

jobs.description: TeaZen may accept job applications through the jobs page. Users can ask about open positions and applying.

loyalty_program.name: Bubble Club
loyalty_program.description: Bubble Club is TeaZen's loyalty program. Customers can ask for general information about the program and rewards.
